channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: US Olympic and Paralympic officials fire coach and director after AP report on sexual abuse
item.description: The U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee has fired a coach and a director after The Associated Press reported that the coach was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete, causing her so much distress that she attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Here's how the new NFL rules on kickoffs and overtime will work
item.description: The one-year trial version of the dynamic kickoff in the NFL led to an uptick in the return rate that wasn't quite as much as the league had hoped.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Curry hits 12 3-pointers, scores 52 as Warriors defeat Grizzlies 134-125
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Stephen Curry had 52 points, including 12 3-pointers, as the Golden State Warriors held on for a 134-125 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan State's Holloman, Booker, Michigan's Donaldson enter transfer portal, St. John's adds Sanon
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Michigan State's Tre Holloman plans to end his college career at another school and Xavier Booker is shooting for a fresh start. Holloman's agent, Brandon Grier, said the guard entered the transfer portal and informed coach Tom Izzo of his decision on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni 'really excited' to visit Trump for Super Bowl celebration at White House
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles will head to the White House on April 28 for their Super Bowl celebration with President Trump, and Nick Sirianni is looking forward to it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL Draft prospect Jaxson Dart bags turkey on hunt after pro day
item.description: Former Ole Miss Rebels star quarterback Jaxson Dart bagged a turkey on a hunt after he had a standout performance at Ole Miss Pro Day last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN's Stephen A Smith calls out LSU's Kim Mulkey after coach's exchange with reporter
item.description: ESPN star Stephen A. Smith described LSU women's basketball coach Kim Mulkey as "rude" after she had a terse back-and-forth with a reporter on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Auburn cheerleaders send college basketball fans swooning
item.description: The Auburn Tigers cheerleading team went viral on Monday after the men's basketball team defeated Michigan State in the Elite Eight of the tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Betting favorite UConn joins 3 top seeds in South Carolina, UCLA and Texas in women's Final Four
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — The women's Final Four is full of star players, top seeds and historic programs. There will be no Cinderellas in Tampa, Florida, this week with No. 1 seeds South Carolina, UCLA and Texas in the national semifinals.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Madison Booker helps Texas reach its first women's Final Four since 2003 with 58-47 win over TCU
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Rori Harmon put her hands on her knees and bowed her head as the clock wound down. The Texas senior guard doesn't like crying, but she gave herself a moment to reflect on the past 10 months. This time last year, Harmon was sidelined by a knee injury.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Curtis Granderson talks Cam Smith and Kyle Tucker, Will Venable and the Sox identity, torpedo bats
item.description: Cubs' top prospect Cam Smith is set to make his MLB debut this season, while the White Sox are off to a respectable start with a 2-2 record, and the Yankees have introduced torpedo bats, which are technically operating within the guidelines of the current rule book but are causing outrage among fans
item.dc:creator: Chris Boden, WGN 9

item.title: Utes lose to Butler in College Basktball Crown
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes got one more opportunity to play this season, but lost to Butler in the inaugural College Basketball Crown tournament in Las Vegas Monday, 86-84. Keanu Dawes, who entered the transfer portal last week, led the Utes with 19 points and 11 rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Cummard named BYU women's basketball coach
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU has named Lee Cummard as its next women's basketball head coach. Cummard has been the interim head coach since Amber Whiting resigned after three seasons on March 8.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Amalie Arena transforms for NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: Amalie Arena is all about basketball for the next week, as the NCAA Women's Final Four takes over Tampa with events around the city.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Diamondbacks rally for 8 runs in the eighth to beat the Cubs 10-6, split 4-game series
item.description: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. hit a game-tying, two-run homer, Josh Naylor had the go-ahead RBI double and the Arizona Diamondbacks used an eight-run eighth inning to rally past the Chicago Cubs 10-6 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: Chloe Kitts scored 14 points and defending national champion South Carolina reached the Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament for a fifth straight year, beating Duke 54-50 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's great D sends Blue Devils to their 18th Final Four with an 85-65 win over Alabama
item.description: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg swooped across the paint and swatted an Alabama player’s shot completely off the court. The ball landed in the stands. Flagg and the Blue Devils -- they’re headed to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: Houston spent time this week practicing an inbound play that coach Kelvin Sampson thought his team might need against Purdue.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Fox 5

item.title: RSL seeks redemption in Minnesota after home setback
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4) — Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back from a rare home loss as they go on the road to face Minnesota United FC on Saturday night. Real Salt Lake’s attack will be bolstered by the return of Polish attacking winger Dominic Marzcuk and U.S.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Lightning strike early and often in 8-0 win over Utah HC
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club will need close to a miracle to make the NHL playoffs now. After suffering its worst blowout loss of the season, coupled with a St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Major League Cricket coming to Oakland Coliseum
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (KRON) -- In the East Bay, the City of Oakland has announced that Major League Cricket will play matches at the Coliseum this summer. Cricket is the world’s second most popular sport, after soccer.
item.dc:creator: Charles Clifford, KRON4
